case_title: ROBERT GERSON VS. GWBC BUILDER CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY GERSON, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT GWBC BUILDER CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JAN-31-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT GERSON. DEFENDANT GWBC BUILDER CO. INC. DID NOT APPEAR. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS NECESSARY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 - SERVED DEC-07-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GWBC BUILDER CO., INC.

SMALL CLAIMS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 29, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINBTIFF AND DEFENDANT (MOVING PARTY). PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE AND TESTIMONY PRESENTED, AND CONSIDERING OF THE ORAL ARGUMENT, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERSON, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GWBC BUILDER CO., INC. $9,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,640.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GWBC BUILDER CO., INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT GERSON. DEFENDANT GWBC BUILDERS CO. INC. DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GWBC BUILDER CO., INC. HEARING SET FOR MAR-29-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JUL-01-2019
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GWBC BUILDER CO., INC.
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE - DENIED
